---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description of the task]"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

## Maintenance Task
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task (e.g., code refactoring, dependency update, documentation improvement).

## Impact
Explain the impact of this maintenance task. Will it improve performance, reduce technical debt, or make the codebase easier to maintain?

## Proposed Changes
Describe the specific changes you plan to make (e.g., "Update all dependencies to latest versions", "Refactor the login module to use async/await").

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here (e.g., links to related issues, screenshots, or logs).
